only creates interface and connection objects.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No suspicious behavior, no hardcoded secrets, no obfuscation, straightforward pattern.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe, standard code for contract interaction.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.2 seems reasonable given it's a utility; low risk score justified.\n\n**Report 2:**\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Similar to above, providing a factory for pool data access.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** No data leaks or external writes; read-only access.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No signs of malicious code, no obfuscation, standard pattern.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe, straightforward.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.0-0.1 appropriate.\n\n**Report 3:**\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Same pattern, creating an interface to a specific contract.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** No active external data processing beyond connection setup.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No malicious signs, no secrets, standard code.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.1 acceptable.\n\n**Report 4:**\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Factory class for contract interaction.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** Standard connection pattern, no external data leaks.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No signs of malicious behavior; connection to any address is typical.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.1-0.2 reasonable.\n\n**Report 5:**\n- **Purpose & Sources:** Same as above, for read-only pool state.\n- **Sinks & Flows:** No external data leaks, only static ABI usage.\n- **Anomalies & Analysis:** No signs of obfuscation or malicious intent.\n- **Conclusion:** Safe.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk=0.0-0.1 appropriate.\n\n---\n\n### Summary of Findings:\n- All reports correctly identify that the code is autogenerated, static, and only provides interfaces for interacting with a known contract.\n- No evidence of malicious behavior, obfuscation, or security risks.\n- The scores assigned (malware=0, obfuscated=0, risk generally low) are consistent with the analysis.\n\n### Final assessment:\n- **Malware score:** 0 for all, as there's no indication of malicious code.\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0, as the code is straightforward and autogenerated.\n- **Risk score:** Given the code is purely a utility for contract interaction with no data processing or external inputs, a risk score of around 0.0 to 0.2 is appropriate.\n\n### My own estimate:\n- **Malware:** 0\n- **Obfuscated:** 0\n- **Risk:** 0.1 (since it's a utility class with no known vulnerabilities or malicious intent)\n\n**In conclusion:**  \nThe reports are accurate;
